opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: The bottoms of my feet are covered in hundreds of tiny, hard blisters. They itch and burn so intensely I can't put any pressure on them at all.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Sudden painful blisters on the soles of both feet, too sore to walk — I'm worried it's an allergy or burn.

symptom_narrative.onset: sudden blistering eruption on both soles 48h ago
symptom_narrative.character: lots of tense deep-seated clear blisters on the insteps/soles, intensely itchy and burning
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: insteps and soles of both feet; also itchy scaly toe-webs
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: clear (not pus) blisters; macerated peeling toe-webs; scaly soles; slightly thickened yellow toenails; malodour; no fever
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: crawling to avoid standing on the soles

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: itchy scaly feet on and off

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: several days in occlusive unventilated boots with heavy sweating

objective_data_offered.value: dozens of tense deep-seated 2-5mm clear blisters on red skin over both insteps/soles; macerated peeling skin between the outer toes; fine scaling on the sides of the feet; slightly thickened yellow toenails
